---
title: "Catalysts and buffers: How diversity and status in social networks shape attitudes towards inequality in contemporary societies"
subtitle: "Outputs"
author: "Gonzalo Franetovic"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  rmdformats::downcute:
    toc_depth: 3 
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: true
    lightbox: true
    gallery: false
    highlight: tango
    paged_table: true
---


```{r Setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, paged.print=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	echo = FALSE,
	include = TRUE,
	fig.align="center",
	out.width='\\textwidth',
	fig.fullwidth=TRUE,
	paged.print=TRUE
	)
```

```{r}

# Load packages
# install.packages("pacman")
# install.packages("devtools")
# devtools::install_git("https://code.europa.eu/digclass/digclass.git")

library("pacman")
p_load(
  tidyverse, here, sjlabelled, stringr, haven, ggpubr, ggplotify, sjmisc,
  ggrepel, stargazer, lme4, performance, sjPlot, ggeffects, 
  sandwich, lmtest, ggcorrplot, psych, gridExtra, cowplot,
  conflicted, summarytools, openxlsx, janitor, DIGCLASS, patchwork,
  lavaan, semTools, fixest, lmerTest, clubSandwich, mgcv
)

# Options
options(max.print=999999)
options(scipen=999)

#Packages conflicts
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select,
                 dplyr::filter,
                 dplyr::lag,
                 sjlabelled::as_label,
                 cowplot::plot_grid,
                 lme4::lmer)

```


```{r}
# Load data
rm(list = ls())
final_database = readRDS(here("Output", "260608_Final_Database_Article.rds"))
names(final_database)

final_database |> as.data.frame()  |> stargazer(type = "text", digits = 2)
```

```{r}
#Countries
data_country = final_database %>% 
  distinct(country_short)
#Country vectors
final_countries_long = final_database %>% distinct(country_long) %>% as_vector()
final_countries_short = final_database %>% distinct(country_short) %>% as_vector()

plot_countries = paste(shQuote(final_countries_short, type="sh"), collapse=", ") 
plot_countries = gsub("'", "", plot_countries)

```

```{r}
#Labs
attitudes.labs <- c("Perception of inequality", "Preference for redistribution")
names(attitudes.labs) <- c("p_ineq", "b_redis")

network.labs <- c("Network diversity", "Network status")
names(network.labs) <- c("net_diversity_std", "net_status_std")
```


# Descriptives

```{r}
final_database_df = final_database %>% 
  select(p_ineq, b_redis, 
         net_diversity_std_country, net_status_std_country,
         ses3,
         sex, age, area
         )

table1 <- dfSummary(final_database_df, 
                    round.digits = 2,
                    labels.col = FALSE,
                    valid.col	= FALSE,
                    na.col	=FALSE,
                    graph.col	= FALSE)

print(table1, method = "browser", file = here("Output", "Body", "Table_1.html"))

```


## Personal networks

```{r}

# pg_1_driver

#Occupations master
isco_codes = c(8331, 1120, 9112, 5141, 1212,
               2611, 7231, 2221, 5412, 2341)
isco_positions = c("01", "02", "03", "04", "05", 
                   "06", "07", "08", "09", "10")

isco_master = all_labels$isco08 %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  filter(isco08 %in% isco_codes) %>% 
  arrange(factor(isco08, levels = isco_codes)) %>% 
  rename(isco08 = isco08,
         occupation = isco08_label_e) %>% 
  mutate(isei08 = as.numeric(isco08_to_isei(isco08))) %>% 
  add_column(isco_positions) %>% 
  mutate(occupation = str_replace_all(occupation, "'", ""))

#Column names
network_positions_frq = final_database %>% 
  select(starts_with("pg_")) %>% 
  summarise_all(mean) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),   # Select all columns
    names_to = "variable", # Column for variable names
    values_to = "value"    # Column for values
  )

table_a1 = isco_master %>% 
  bind_cols(network_positions_frq) %>% 
  mutate(value = round(value, 2)) %>% 
  select(occupation, isco08, isei08, value) %>% 
  rename(isei = isei08,
         pct_known = value) %>% 
  arrange(desc(isei))

table_a1

write.xlsx(table_a1, here("Output", "Appendix", "Table_A1.xlsx"))

```


```{r}

n_total = nrow(final_database)

table_a4_1 = final_database %>% 
  group_by(country_long, country_short) %>% 
  summarise(n = n()) 

table_a4_2 = final_database %>% 
  group_by(country_long, country_short) %>% 
  summarise_all(mean) %>% 
  select(country_long, country_short, starts_with("pn_"), 
         net_diversity_std, net_status_std, p_ineq, b_redis)

table_a4_3 = final_database %>% 
  summarise_all(mean) %>% 
  select(country_long, country_short, starts_with("pn_"), 
         net_diversity_std, net_status_std, p_ineq, b_redis)  %>% 
  mutate(across(c(starts_with("country_")),
               ~as.character(.),
               .names = '{col}')) %>% 
  mutate(country_long="Total",
         n=n_total)

table_a4 = table_a4_1 %>% 
  left_join(table_a4_2) %>% 
  bind_rows(table_a4_3) 

table_a4 = table_a4 %>%
  mutate(across(c(pn_upperreachability:b_redis), ~ round(.x, 2)))

table_a4

write.xlsx(table_a4, here("Output", "Appendix", "Table_A4.xlsx"))

```


```{r, results = 'asis'}

#Individual plot
figure_1 <- final_database %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = net_status_std_country, y = net_diversity_std_country)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.01) +
  geom_smooth(method="loess", se=FALSE, color="black", span=1.0) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Network status", y = "Network diversity")

figure_1

ggsave(here("Output", "Body", "Figure_1.png"),
       figure_1, height = 5, width = 10, dpi = 600)

cor(final_database$net_status_std_country, final_database$net_diversity_std_country)

```

## Bivariates

### Individuals

### Countries

```{r}

# Means by country
network_diversity_country = final_database %>% 
  select(country_long, country_short, 
  starts_with("pn_"), starts_with("net_")) %>% 
  group_by(country_long, country_short) %>% 
  summarise_all(mean) %>% 
  ungroup() 

# Means by total
network_diversity_total = final_database %>% 
  select(country_long, country_short, 
  starts_with("pn_"), starts_with("net_")) %>% 
  summarise_all(mean)  %>% 
  mutate(country_long = ifelse(is.na(country_long), "Total", country_long)) %>% 
  mutate(country_short = as.character(country_short),
         country_region = as.character(country_region))

#Table: Means
network_diversity_country_total = network_diversity_country %>% 
  bind_rows(network_diversity_total)

```


```{r}
# Means by country
attitudes_country = final_database %>% 
  select(country_long, country_short, p_ineq, b_redis) %>% 
  group_by(country_long, country_short) %>% 
  summarise_all(mean) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(country_long = as.character(country_long),
         country_short = as.character(country_short),
         country_region = as.character(country_region))

# Means by total
attitudes_total = final_database %>% 
  select(country_long, country_short, p_ineq, b_redis) %>% 
  summarise_all(mean)  %>% 
  mutate(country_long = ifelse(is.na(country_long), "Total", country_long)) %>% 
  mutate(country_short = as.character(country_short),
         country_region = as.character(country_region))

#Table: Means
attitudes_country_total = attitudes_country %>% 
  bind_rows(attitudes_total)

attitudes_country_total

#Merge
attitudes_network_country = attitudes_country %>% 
  left_join(network_diversity_country)

#Long country database
attitudes_network_country_long = attitudes_network_country %>% 
  select(country_short, p_ineq, b_redis, net_diversity_std, net_status_std) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(net_diversity_std, net_status_std), 
               names_to = "network", 
               values_to = "network_values") %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(p_ineq, b_redis), 
               names_to = "attitude", 
               values_to = "attitude_values")

attitudes_network_country_long$attitude <- factor(attitudes_network_country_long$attitude,
                levels = c("p_ineq", "b_redis"))
```

```{r}

# === PERCEPTION PLOT (diversity) ===
data_country_diversity <- final_database %>%
  group_by(country_long) %>%
  mutate(
    diversity_q_country = ntile(net_diversity_std_country, 5)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Country means
data_country_diversity_A <- data_country_diversity %>%
  group_by(country_long) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), p_ineq_country = mean(p_ineq, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(diversity_q_country = "Country average")

# Q1/Q5 means
data_country_diversity_B <- data_country_diversity %>% 
  filter(diversity_q_country %in% c(1, 5)) %>%
  mutate(diversity_q_country = factor(diversity_q_country, levels = c(1, 5), labels = c("Q1 (lowest)", "Q5 (highest)"))) %>%
  group_by(country_long, diversity_q_country) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), p_ineq = mean(p_ineq, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Orden países por media EXPLÍCITO como factor
country_order <- data_country_diversity_A %>%
  arrange(p_ineq_country) %>%
  pull(country_long)

data_country_diversity_plot <- bind_rows(data_country_diversity_A, data_country_diversity_B) %>%
  mutate(
    country_long = factor(country_long, levels = country_order),
    diversity_q_country = factor(diversity_q_country, 
                                 levels = c("Q1 (lowest)", "Country average", "Q5 (highest)"))
  )


figure_2 <- ggplot(data_country_diversity_plot, aes(x = country_long, y = ifelse(diversity_q_country == "Country average", p_ineq_country, p_ineq), 
                                shape = diversity_q_country, color = diversity_q_country)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(2.75,4.75)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(15, 8, 17)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73")) +
  labs(x = "Country", y = "Perception of inequality", 
       shape = "Network diversity", color = "Network diversity") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  # Horizontal line at global country mean
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(data_country_diversity_plot$p_ineq_country[data_country_diversity_plot$diversity_q_country == "Country average"], na.rm = TRUE), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50")

figure_2
ggsave(here("Output", "Body", "Figure_2.png"), figure_2, height = 5, width = 10, dpi = 600)

# === REDISTRIBUTION PLOT (status) ===
data_country_status <- final_database %>%
  group_by(country_long) %>%
  mutate(
    status_q_country = ntile(net_status_std_country, 5)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Country means
data_country_status_A <- data_country_status %>%
  group_by(country_long) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), b_redis_country = mean(b_redis, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(status_q_country = "Country average")

# Q1/Q5 means
data_country_status_B <- data_country_status %>% 
  filter(status_q_country %in% c(1, 5)) %>%
  mutate(status_q_country = factor(status_q_country, levels = c(1, 5), labels = c("Q1 (lowest)", "Q5 (highest)"))) %>%
  group_by(country_long, status_q_country) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), b_redis = mean(b_redis, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Combine and order by country mean
# Orden países por media b_redis EXPLÍCITO
country_order_D <- data_country_status_A %>%
  arrange(b_redis_country) %>%
  pull(country_long)

data_country_status_plot <- bind_rows(data_country_status_A, data_country_status_B) %>%
  mutate(
    country_long = factor(country_long, levels = country_order_D),
    status_q_country = factor(status_q_country, 
                              levels = c("Q1 (lowest)", "Country average", "Q5 (highest)"))
  )


figure_3 <- ggplot(data_country_status_plot, aes(x = country_long, y = ifelse(status_q_country == "Country average", b_redis_country, b_redis), 
                                shape = status_q_country, color = status_q_country)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(2.75,4.75)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(15, 8, 17)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73")) +
  labs(x = "Country", y = "Preference for redistribution", 
       shape = "Network status", color = "Network status") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(data_country_status_plot$b_redis_country[data_country_status_plot$status_q_country == "Country average"], na.rm = TRUE), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50")

figure_3
ggsave(here("Output", "Body", "Figure_3.png"), figure_3, height = 5, width = 10, dpi = 600)


```


  # Regressions

  ## Perception of inequality

  ### Models

  ```{r}

  # Base
  MA1a = lm(p_ineq ~ net_diversity_std_country + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  MA1b = lm(p_ineq ~ net_status_std_country + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  MA1c = lm(p_ineq ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                  + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  # + SES
  MA2c = lm(p_ineq ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                  + ses3
                  + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  # + Sociodemographics
  MA3c = lm(p_ineq ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                  + ses3
                  + sex + age + age2 + area
                  + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  ```

  ### Clustered SE

  ```{r}
  # Calculate clustered standard errors
  clustered_se_MA1a <- vcovCL(MA1a, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  clustered_se_MA1b <- vcovCL(MA1b, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  clustered_se_MA1c <- vcovCL(MA1c, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  clustered_se_MA2c <- vcovCL(MA2c, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  clustered_se_MA3c <- vcovCL(MA3c, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  ```

  ### Table 

  ```{r}
  tab_model(list(MA1a, MA1b, MA1c, MA2c, MA3c),
            show.p = TRUE,
            p.style = "stars",
            p.threshold = c(0.05, 0.01, 0.001),
            show.ci = FALSE,
            show.se = TRUE,
            collapse.se = TRUE,
            rm.terms = "country_short [AU, CH, CN, CZ, DE, DK, EE, ES, FI, FR, 
            GB, HR, HU, IL, IN, IS, JP, LT, MX, NZ, PH, RU, SE, SK, SR, TH, 
            TR, TW, US, ZA]",
            show.aic = TRUE,
            auto.label = FALSE,
            title = "Table. Linear regression models on perception of inequality",
            string.pred = " ",
            file = here("Output", "Appendix", "Models_A.html"),
                        vcov = list(clustered_se_MA1a, clustered_se_MA1b, clustered_se_MA1c,
                                    clustered_se_MA2c, clustered_se_MA3c)
  )

  ```

  ## Preference for redistribution

  ### Models

  ```{r}

  # Base
  MB1a = lm(b_redis ~ net_diversity_std_country + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  MB1b = lm(b_redis ~ net_status_std_country + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  MB1c = lm(b_redis ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                  + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  # + SES
  MB2c = lm(b_redis ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                  + ses3
                  + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  # + Sociodemographics
  MB3c = lm(b_redis ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                  + ses3
                  + sex + age + age2 + area
                  + country_short,
                  data=final_database)

  ```

  ### Clustered SE

  ```{r}
  # Calculate clustered standard errors
  clustered_se_MB1a <- vcovCL(MB1a, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  clustered_se_MB1b <- vcovCL(MB1b, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  clustered_se_MB1c <- vcovCL(MB1c, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  clustered_se_MB2c <- vcovCL(MB2c, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  clustered_se_MB3c <- vcovCL(MB3c, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
  ```

  ### Table 

  ```{r}
  tab_model(list(MB1a, MB1b, MB1c, MB2c, MB3c),
            show.p = TRUE,
            p.style = "stars",
            p.threshold = c(0.05, 0.01, 0.001),
            show.ci = FALSE,
            show.se = TRUE,
            collapse.se = TRUE,
            rm.terms = "country_short [AU, CH, CN, CZ, DE, DK, EE, ES, FI, FR, 
            GB, HR, HU, IL, IN, IS, JP, LT, MX, NZ, PH, RU, SE, SK, SR, TH, 
            TR, TW, US, ZA]",
            show.aic = TRUE,
            auto.label = FALSE,
            title = "Table. Linear regression models on preference for redistribution",
            string.pred = " ",
            file = here("Output", "Appendix", "Models_B.html"),
                        vcov = list(clustered_se_MB1a, clustered_se_MB1b, clustered_se_MB1c,
                                    clustered_se_MB2c, clustered_se_MB3c)
  )

  ```

  ## Resume

  ```{r}
  # Display results using tab_model
  tab_model(list(
    MA1c, MA2c, MA3c, 
    MB1c, MB2c, MB3c
  ),
  show.p = TRUE,
  p.style = "stars",
  p.threshold = c(0.05, 0.01, 0.001),
  show.ci = FALSE,
  show.se = TRUE,
  collapse.se = TRUE,
  rm.terms = "country_short [AU, CH, CN, CZ, DE, DK, EE, ES, FI, FR, 
  GB, HR, HU, IL, IN, IS, JP, LT, MX, NZ, PH, RU, SE, SK, SR, TH, 
  TR, TW, US, ZA]",
  df.method = "wald",
  show.aic = TRUE,
  auto.label = FALSE,
  title = "Table. Linear regression models on perception of inequality (MA) and preference for redistribution (MB)",
  string.pred = " ",
  file = here("Output", "Body", "Table_2.html"),
  vcov = list(clustered_se_MA1c, clustered_se_MA2c, clustered_se_MA3c,
              clustered_se_MB1c, clustered_se_MB2c, clustered_se_MB3c)
  )

  # Compute BIC for each model
  BIC_values_3 <- sapply(list(MA1c, MA2c, MA3c, MB1c, MB2c, MB3c), BIC)

  # Print BIC values
  BIC_values_3

  ```

  ```{r}
  # --- Panel A: Efecto marginal de diversity → perception of inequality (MA3c) ---
  pred_A <- ggpredict(MA3c, terms = "net_diversity_std_country")
  pred_A

  pA <- ggplot(pred_A, aes(x, predicted)) +
    geom_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
                fill = "black", alpha = 0.15) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      y = attitudes.labs[1],
      x = "Network diversity"
    ) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(3.9, 4.5), breaks = seq(3.9, 4.5, 0.1)) 

  pA

  effect_plot(MA3c, pred = net_diversity_std_country, interval = TRUE)


  # --- Panel B: Efecto marginal de status → redistribution preference (MB3c) ---
  pred_B <- ggpredict(MB3c, terms = "net_status_std_country")
  pred_B

  pB <- ggplot(pred_B, aes(x, predicted)) +
    geom_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
                fill = "black", alpha = 0.15) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      y = attitudes.labs[2],
      x = "Network status"
    ) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(3.1, 4.5), breaks = seq(3.1, 4.5, 0.2)) 

  # --- Combinar ---
  figure_4 <- (pA | pB) +
    plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

  ggsave(here("Output", "Body", "Figure_4.png"),
        figure_4, height = 5, width = 10, dpi = 600)

  ggpredict(MA3c, terms = "net_diversity_std_country[-4.16, 0, 2.39]", ci.lvl = 0.95)
  ggpredict(MB3c, terms = "net_status_std_country[-4.41, 0, 3.25]", ci.lvl = 0.95)

  ```

  ```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}

  # Model checks
  check_model(MA1c)
  check_model(MA2c)
  check_model(MA3c)
  check_model(MB1c)
  check_model(MB2c)
  check_model(MB3c)

  ```


## Interactions: diversity and status

```{r}

MA4 = lm(p_ineq ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                + ses3
                + sex + age + age2 + area
                + net_status_std_country*net_diversity_std_country
                + country_short,
                data=final_database)

MB4 = lm(b_redis ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                + ses3
                + sex + age + age2 + area
                + net_status_std_country*net_diversity_std_country
                + country_short,
                data=final_database)
```

```{r}
clustered_se_MA4 <- vcovCL(MA4, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
clustered_se_MB4 <- vcovCL(MB4, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
```

```{r}
tab_model(list(MA4, MB4),
          show.p = TRUE,
          p.style = "stars",
          p.threshold = c(0.05, 0.01, 0.001),
          show.ci = FALSE,
          show.se = TRUE,
          collapse.se = TRUE,
          rm.terms = "country_short [AU, CH, CN, CZ, DE, DK, EE, ES, FI, FR, 
          GB, HR, HU, IL, IN, IS, JP, LT, MX, NZ, PH, RU, SE, SK, SR, TH, 
          TR, TW, US, ZA]",
          show.aic = TRUE,
          auto.label = FALSE,
          title = "Table. Linear regression models on attitudes towards inequality - Interactions 1",
            string.pred = " ",
          vcov = list(clustered_se_MA4, clustered_se_MB4),
          file = here("Output", "Appendix", "Table_A6.html")
)

# Compute BIC for each model
BIC_values_A6 <- sapply(list(MA4, MB4), BIC)

# Print BIC values
BIC_values_A6


```

```{r}

#New
MA4_pred <- ggpredict(MA4, terms = c("net_diversity_std_country", "net_status_std_country[1, 0, -1]"))
int_1_1 <- ggplot(MA4_pred, aes(x, predicted, group = group)) + 
    geom_line(aes(color = group, linetype = group), linewidth = 0.5) +  # Thicker lines
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group), alpha = 0.15) +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73"),
        labels = c("Low (-1)", "Mean (0)", "High (+1)")
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(
        values = c("dotted", "dashed", "solid"),
        labels = c("Low (-1)", "Mean (0)", "High (+1)")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73"),
        labels = c("Low (-1)", "Mean (0)", "High (+1)")
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
        y = attitudes.labs[1],
        x = "Network diversity",
        color = "Network\nstatus",
        linetype = "Network\nstatus",
        fill = "Network\nstatus"
    ) +
    guides(
        fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 0.4)),
        color = guide_legend(title = "Network\nstatus"),
        linetype = guide_legend(title = "Network\nstatus")
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(3.9, 4.5), breaks = seq(3.9, 4.5, 0.1))

int_1_1


MB4_pred <- ggpredict(MB4, terms = c("net_status_std_country", "net_diversity_std_country[1, 0, -1]"))
int_1_3 <- ggplot(MB4_pred, aes(x, predicted, group = group)) + 
    geom_line(aes(color = group, linetype = group), linewidth = 0.5) +  # Thicker lines
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group), alpha = 0.15) + 
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73"),
        labels = c("Low (-1)", "Mean (0)", "High (+1)")
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(
        values = c("dotted", "dashed", "solid"),
        labels = c("Low (-1)", "Mean (0)", "High (+1)")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73"),
        labels = c("Low (-1)", "Mean (0)", "High (+1)")
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
        y = attitudes.labs[2],
        x = "Network status",
        color = "Network\ndiversity",
        linetype = "Network\ndiversity",
        fill = "Network\ndiversity"
    ) +
    guides(
        fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 0.4)),
        color = guide_legend(title = "Network\ndiversity"),
        linetype = guide_legend(title = "Network\ndiversity")
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(3.1, 4.5), breaks = seq(3.1, 4.5, 0.2))

int_1_3

int_1_1$data$group
int_1_3$data$group

figure_5 <- (int_1_1 | int_1_3) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") 


figure_5

ggsave(here("Output", "Body", "Figure_5.png"),
       figure_5, height = 5, width = 10, dpi = 600)
```



```{r}

round(min(final_database$net_diversity_std_country),2)
round(max(final_database$net_diversity_std_country),2)

round(min(final_database$net_status_std_country),2)
round(max(final_database$net_status_std_country),2)

#Predicted values
get_model_data(MA4,  
               type = "pred", 
               terms = c("net_status_std_country[-1, 0, 1]", "net_diversity_std_country[-2.84, 0, 1.43]"),
               ci.lvl = 0.95)

get_model_data(MB4,  
               type = "pred", 
               terms = c("net_status_std_country[-1, 0, 1]", "net_diversity_std_country[-2.84, 0, 1.43]"),
               ci.lvl = 0.95)

```


## Interactions: SES

```{r}
MA7 = lm(p_ineq ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                + ses3
                + sex + age + age2 + area
                + net_diversity_std_country*ses3
                + country_short,
                data=final_database)

MA8 = lm(p_ineq ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                + ses3
                + sex + age + age2 + area
                + net_status_std_country*ses3
                + country_short,
                data=final_database)

MB7 = lm(b_redis ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                + ses3
                + sex + age + age2 + area
                + net_diversity_std_country*ses3
                + country_short,
                data=final_database)

MB8 = lm(b_redis ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                + ses3
                + sex + age + age2 + area
                + net_status_std_country*ses3
                + country_short,
                data=final_database)
```

```{r}
clustered_se_MA7 <- vcovCL(MA7, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
clustered_se_MA8 <- vcovCL(MA8, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
clustered_se_MB7 <- vcovCL(MB7, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
clustered_se_MB8 <- vcovCL(MB8, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
```

```{r}
tab_model(list(MA7, MB8),
          show.p = TRUE,
          p.style = "stars",
          p.threshold = c(0.05, 0.01, 0.001),
          show.ci = FALSE,
          show.se = TRUE,
          collapse.se = TRUE,
          rm.terms = "country_short [AU, CH, CN, CZ, DE, DK, EE, ES, FI, FR, 
          GB, HR, HU, IL, IN, IS, JP, LT, MX, NZ, PH, RU, SE, SK, SR, TH, 
          TR, TW, US, ZA]",
          show.aic = TRUE,
          auto.label = FALSE,
          title = "Table. Linear regression models on attitudes towards inequality - Interactions 2",
            string.pred = " ",
          vcov = list(clustered_se_MA7, clustered_se_MB7,
                      clustered_se_MA8, clustered_se_MB8),
          file = here("Output", "Appendix", "Table_A7.html")
)


# Compute BIC for each model
BIC_values_A7 <- sapply(list(MA7, MB8), BIC)

# Print BIC values
BIC_values_A7

```

```{r}

MA7_pred <- ggpredict(MA7, terms = c("net_diversity_std_country", "ses3[Low,Mid,High]"))
int_2_1 <- ggplot(MA7_pred, aes(x, predicted, group = group)) + 
    geom_line(aes(color = group, linetype = group), linewidth = 0.5) +  # Thicker lines
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group), alpha = 0.15) +
  scale_color_manual(
        values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73"),
        labels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(
        values = c("dotted", "dashed", "solid"),
        labels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73"),
        labels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
        y = attitudes.labs[1],
        x = "Network diversity",
        color = "SES",
        linetype = "SES",
        fill = "SES"
    ) +
    guides(
        fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 0.4)),
        color = guide_legend(title = "SES"),
        linetype = guide_legend(title = "SES")
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(3.9, 4.5), breaks = seq(3.9, 4.5, 0.1))

int_2_1


MB8_pred <- ggpredict(MB8, terms = c("net_status_std_country", "ses3[Low,Mid,High]"))
int_3_3 <- ggplot(MB8_pred, aes(x, predicted, group = group)) + 
    geom_line(aes(color = group, linetype = group), linewidth = 0.5) +  # Thicker lines
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group), alpha = 0.15) + 
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73"),
        labels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(
        values = c("dotted", "dashed", "solid"),
        labels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("#D55E00", "#0072B2", "#009E73"),
        labels = c("Low", "Mid", "High")
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
        y = attitudes.labs[2],
        x = "Network status",
        color = "SES",
        linetype = "SES",
        fill = "SES"
    ) +
    guides(
        fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 0.4)),
        color = guide_legend(title = "SES"),
        linetype = guide_legend(title = "SES")
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(3.1, 4.5), breaks = seq(3.1, 4.5, 0.2))

int_3_3


figure_6 <- (int_2_1 | int_3_3) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

figure_6

ggsave(here("Output", "Body", "Figure_6.png"),
       figure_6, height = 5, width = 10, dpi = 600)
```

```{r}

round(min(final_database$net_diversity_std_country),2)
round(max(final_database$net_diversity_std_country),2)

round(min(final_database$net_status_std_country),2)
round(max(final_database$net_status_std_country),2)

#Predicted values
get_model_data(MA7,  
               type = "pred", 
               terms = c("net_diversity_std_country[-1, 0, 1]", "ses3[Low,Mid,High]"),
               ci.lvl = 0.95)

get_model_data(MB7,  
               type = "pred", 
               terms = c("net_diversity_std_country[-1, 0, 1]", "ses3[Low,Mid,High]"),
               ci.lvl = 0.95)

get_model_data(MA8,  
               type = "pred", 
               terms = c("net_status_std_country[-1, 0, 1]", "ses3[Low,Mid,High]"),
               ci.lvl = 0.95)

get_model_data(MB8,  
               type = "pred",
               terms = c("net_status_std_country[-1, 0, 1]", "ses3[Low,Mid,High]"),
               ci.lvl = 0.95)

final_database |> as.data.frame() |> stargazer(type = "text")
```

# Robustness check

## Additional controls

```{r}
# Add additional variables
issp_2017_original_full = readRDS(here("Output", "260608_ISSP_Social_Networks_Full.rds"))

# Income

# 1. Auto-detectar todas las variables que terminan en "_inc"
inc_vars <- names(issp_2017_original_full)[str_ends(names(issp_2017_original_full), "_inc")]

additional_controls <- issp_2017_original_full %>%
  # 2. Recode: valores >= 999990 a NA en todas las income específicas
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(inc_vars),
      ~ ifelse(.x >= 999990, NA, .x)
    )
  ) %>%
  # 3. Variable unificada de income: coalesce de todas las específicas
  mutate(
    hh_inc_raw = coalesce(!!!rlang::syms(inc_vars))
  ) %>%
  # 4. Quintiles dentro de cada país
  group_by(country_short) %>%
  mutate(
    hh_inc_quintile = if_else(
      is.na(hh_inc_raw),
      NA_integer_,
      ntile(hh_inc_raw, 5)
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(hh_inc_quintile = ifelse(is.na(hh_inc_quintile), 6, hh_inc_quintile)) %>%
  ungroup()

#Political ideologuy: party_lr (1-5, left to right, 6 other)
#Work status: work (1 working, 2 unemployed, 3 never worked)
#Union membership: union (1 yes, 0 no)
additional_controls = additional_controls %>%
  mutate(political_ideology = if_else(party_lr >= 1 & party_lr <= 6, party_lr, NA),
         educ_years = if_else(educyrs >= 0 & educyrs <= 90, as.numeric(educyrs), NA),
         work_status = if_else(work >= 1 & work <= 3, work, NA),
         union_member = if_else(union == 1, 1, if_else(union %in% c(2,3), 0, NA)))

#Add value labels
additional_controls = additional_controls %>%
  mutate(hh_inc_quintile = factor(hh_inc_quintile, levels = 1:6,
                                     labels = c("Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5", "Not declared")),
         political_ideology = factor(political_ideology, levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6),
                                     labels = c("Far-left", "Left", "Center", "Right", "Far-right", "Other")),
         work_status = factor(work_status, levels = c(1, 2, 3),
                              labels = c("Working", "Unemployed", "Never worked")),
         union_member = factor(union_member, levels = c(0, 1),
                               labels = c("No", "Yes")))

frq(additional_controls, hh_inc_quintile, political_ideology, work_status, union_member)

additional_controls = additional_controls %>%
  select(caseid, country_short, hh_inc_quintile, educ_years, work_status, union_member, political_ideology)


# Merge with final_database
final_database_additional <- final_database %>%
  left_join(additional_controls, by = c("caseid", "country_short"))

# Percentage of missing values for political ideology
# missing_political_ideology <- final_database_additional %>%
#   summarise(
#     missing = sum(is.na(political_ideology)),
#     total = n(),
#     percent_missing = (missing / total) * 100
#   )
# Political ideology: All missings in CN, GB, PH, SR, TW.

final_database_additional_names <- names(final_database_additional)

final_database_additional %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(final_database_additional_names), ~ to_numeric(.))) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  stargazer(type = "text")

```

```{r}

# Re-run models with additional controls
MA3c_add <- lm(p_ineq ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                  + ses3
                  + sex + age + age2 + area
                  + educ_years + hh_inc_quintile
                  + work_status + union_member
                  + country_short,
                  data = final_database_additional)
MB3c_add <- lm(b_redis ~ net_diversity_std_country + net_status_std_country
                  + ses3
                  + sex + age + age2 + area
                  + educ_years + hh_inc_quintile
                  + work_status + union_member
                  + country_short,
                  data = final_database_additional)
# Calculate clustered standard errors
clustered_se_MA3c_add <- vcovCL(MA3c_add, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)
clustered_se_MB3c_add <- vcovCL(MB3c_add, vcov = vcovCL, type = "HC1", cluster = ~country_short)

# Display results using tab_model
tab_model(list(MA3c_add, MB3c_add),
          show.p = TRUE,
          p.style = "stars",
          p.threshold = c(0.05, 0.01, 0.001),
          show.ci = FALSE,
          show.se = TRUE,
          collapse.se = TRUE,
          rm.terms = "country_short [AU, CH, CN, CZ, DE, DK, EE, ES, FI, FR, 
          GB, HR, HU, IL, IN, IS, JP, LT, MX, NZ, PH, RU, SE, SK, SR, TH, 
          TR, TW, US, ZA]",
          show.aic = TRUE,
          auto.label = FALSE,
          title = "Table. Linear regression models on attitudes towards inequality - Additional controls",
            string.pred = " ",
          vcov = list(clustered_se_MA3c_add, clustered_se_MB3c_add),
          file = here("Output", "Appendix", "Table_A5.html")
)

```
